# BattleRobots ŌĆö Project Roadmap

## Vision
A physics-driven robot combat game built in Unity. Players assemble modular robots,
enter battle arenas, earn currency from wins, and unlock upgraded parts. All physics
uses ArticulationBody exclusively. The economy, save system, and event bus are SO-driven.

---

## Architecture Rules (enforced every session)
- **ArticulationBody only** ŌĆö never Rigidbody for robot parts
- **No heap allocations** in Update / FixedUpdate
- **SO Event Channels** for all cross-component communication
- **SO assets immutable at runtime** ŌĆö write only through designated mutator methods
- **XOR SaveSystem** for all persistence (MatchRecord, Wallet snapshot)
- **BattleRobots.UI** must never reference **BattleRobots.Physics**
- **PlayerWallet**: SO for runtime state, MatchRecord for persistence
- Namespaces: `BattleRobots.Core` / `BattleRobots.Physics` / `BattleRobots.UI` / `BattleRobots.Editor`

---

| T091 | MatchModifierSO + MatchModifierCatalogSO + SelectedModifierSO + MatchModifierSelectionController ŌĆö pre-match rule modifier system | 90 | **Done** | MatchModifierType enum (6 values: Standard/DoubleRewards/ExtendedTime/ShortTime/FragileArmor/Overdrive). MatchModifierSO SO (Core, CreateAssetMenu "BattleRobots/Match/MatchModifier"): DisplayName/Description; RewardMultiplier float Ōēź0.1 (default 1.0); TimeMultiplier float Ōēź0.1 (default 1.0); ArmorMultiplier float Ōēź0 (default 1.0); SpeedMultiplier float Ōēź0.1 (default 1.0); OnValidate clamps all multipliers to minimums + warns empty DisplayName. MatchModifierCatalogSO SO (Core, CreateAssetMenu "BattleRobots/Match/MatchModifierCatalog"): immutable IReadOnlyList<MatchModifierSO>; OnValidate warns null entries. SelectedModifierSO (Core, CreateAssetMenu "BattleRobots/Match/SelectedModifier"): mutable runtime SO; Select(modifier) sets Current+HasSelection+fires VoidGameEvent; Reset() clears silently; CurrentDisplayName ŌåÆ "Standard" fallback when unset/null. MatchModifierSelectionController MB (BattleRobots.UI): mirrors DifficultySelectionController pattern ŌĆö prev/next wrap-around, optional _nameLabel+_descriptionLabel Text labels, ApplySelection on OnEnable, cached UnityAction delegates, no Update, no Physics refs. MatchManager patched: optional _selectedModifier field; HandleMatchStarted multiplies _timeRemaining by Current.TimeMultiplier after base duration resolved; caches _activeRoundDuration (post-modifier) to fix elapsed computation bug when time multiplier != 1; EndMatch applies Current.RewardMultiplier to totalReward after streak bonus (streak ├Ś modifier stacking). CombatStatsApplicator patched: optional _selectedModifier field; ApplyStats() scales base speed by Current.SpeedMultiplier and armor rating by Current.ArmorMultiplier (Mathf.Clamp [0,100]) before pushing to locomotion/DamageReceiver. All integrations fully null-safe; backwards-compatible (null _selectedModifier = multipliers all 1). MatchModifierSOTests (13 tests): 7 fresh-instance defaults; MatchModifierType_HasExactlySixValues; AllModifierTypes_CanBeAssignedAndRead; 4 reflection round-trips. MatchModifierCatalogSOTests (6 tests): not-null/empty/IReadOnlyList; count 1/2; insertion order. SelectedModifierSOTests (14 tests): 3 fresh-instance defaults; Select 8 paths (state/event/null/idempotent); Reset 3 paths (clears+silent). MatchModifierSelectionControllerTests (16 tests): initial index=0; NextModifier null/empty/increment/wrap/cycle; PreviousModifier null/empty/wrap/decrement; NextThenPrev returns start; SO write verification (next/prev); null SO no-throw. Total tests: 1292 across 97 files. |

**Next milestone (M175):** Suggested directions: (a) `ZoneControlCaptureSigmaAlgebraSO + ZoneControlCaptureSigmaAlgebraController` ŌĆö sigma-algebra (measure theory); player captures accumulate measurable sets; `Measure()` awards bonus; bot captures scatter sets; (b) `ZoneControlCaptureMeasureSO + ZoneControlCaptureMeasureController` ŌĆö measure space; player captures accumulate samples; `Integrate()` awards bonus; bot captures remove samples; (c) `ZoneControlCaptureOrderIdealSO + ZoneControlCaptureOrderIdealController` ŌĆö order ideal (downward-closed set in poset); player captures accumulate ideals; `Extend()` awards bonus; bot captures shrink ideals; (d) `ZoneControlCaptureGaloisSO + ZoneControlCaptureGaloisController` ŌĆö Galois connection; player captures accumulate closures; `Connect()` awards bonus; bot captures break connections.

**M83 Zone Control Zone Switch Tracker, Capture Combo Multiplier, Zone Ownership Rating &amp; Match Intensity ŌĆö ALL TASKS COMPLETE (T386ŌĆōT389).**
- T386: `ZoneControlZoneSwitchTrackerSO` (Core SO) ŌĆö `_frequentSwitchThreshold [Min(1)]` default 5; `RecordCapture(int zoneIndex)` first call initialises last-zone without counting as switch; subsequent calls increment `_switchCount` when zone differs; fires `_onSwitchRecorded` on each switch and `_onFrequentSwitcher` (idempotent) on threshold crossing; `Reset()` silent; `OnEnableŌåÆReset`. `ZoneControlZoneSwitchTrackerController` (UI MB) ŌĆö `_onPlayerZoneCaptured IntGameEventŌåÆHandlePlayerZoneCaptured(int)ŌåÆRecordCapture+Refresh`; `_onMatchStartedŌåÆReset+Refresh`; `_onSwitchRecorded/_onFrequentSwitcherŌåÆRefresh`; `Refresh()`: nullŌåÆhide; show+switchesLabel="Switches: N"+statusLabel="FREQUENT SWITCHER"\/"Building..."; DisallowMultipleComponent. 12 tests.

- T330: `ZoneControlCaptureStreakRewardSO` (Core SO) ŌĆö `_streakMilestones int[]` default {3,5,10,20}; `_rewardPerMilestone [Min(0)]` default 100; `EvaluateStreak(int)` iterates pending milestones while streakŌēźmilestone[i], increments `_unlockedMilestoneCount` + accumulates `_totalRewardAwarded` + fires `_onMilestoneReached` per tier; `NextMilestone` returns -1 when all crossed; `Reset()` silent. `ZoneControlCaptureStreakRewardController` (UI MB) ŌĆö `_onStreakUpdatedŌåÆHandleStreakUpdated`: reads `streakSO.CurrentStreak`, calls `EvaluateStreak`, credits `earned` difference to wallet, Refresh; `_onMatchStartedŌåÆHandleMatchStartedŌåÆReset+Refresh`; `_onMilestoneReachedŌåÆRefresh`; `_streakLabel="Streak: N"`; `_nextMilestoneLabel="Next: N"/"Max!"`; panel hidden when rewardSO null. 12 tests.
- T331: `ZoneControlZoneControllerCatalogSO` (Core SO) ŌĆö `_zoneCount [Min(1)]` default 4; `bool[] _playerOwned` runtime array; `SetZoneController(int zoneIndex, bool playerOwned)` OOB-safe + fires `_onControlChanged`; `GetZoneController(int)` returns false for OOB; `PlayerOwnedCount` iterates array; `Reset()` re-allocates/clears silently. `ZoneControlZonePresenceController` (Core MB) ŌĆö `_onPlayerZoneCaptured IntGameEventŌåÆHandlePlayerZoneCapturedŌåÆSetZoneController(index, true)`; `_onBotZoneCaptured IntGameEventŌåÆHandleBotZoneCapturedŌåÆSetZoneController(index, false)`; `_onMatchStartedŌåÆHandleMatchStartedŌåÆReset`; DisallowMultipleComponent. 12 tests.
- T332: `ZoneControlPaceAdvice` enum (OnTarget/AheadOfPace/BehindPace). `ZoneControlMatchPaceSO` (Core SO) ŌĆö `_targetPace [Min(0.1f)]` default 1.5; `_aheadThreshold/_behindThreshold [Min(0.1f)]` default 0.5; `EvaluatePace(float)`: rateŌēźtarget+aheadŌåÆAheadOfPace+fires `_onAheadOfPace`; rateŌēżtarget-behindŌåÆBehindPace+fires `_onBehindPace`; else OnTarget; caches `LastAdvice`; `Reset()` silent. `ZoneControlMatchPaceAdvisorController` (UI MB) ŌĆö `_onPaceUpdatedŌåÆHandlePaceUpdatedŌåÆGetCapturesPerMinute(Time.time)+EvaluatePace+Refresh`; `_onMatchStartedŌåÆHandleMatchStartedŌåÆReset+Refresh`; `Refresh()`: null paceSO||trackerSOŌåÆhide; `_adviceLabel="Ease off"/"Speed up"/"On target"` per LastAdvice; panel hidden when either SO null. 12 tests.
- T333: `ZoneControlSessionPayload [Serializable]` sealed class (TotalZonesCaptured/MatchesPlayed/BestCaptureStreak int; RatingHistory `List<int>`; RoundResultWins `List<bool>`). `ZoneControlSessionExportSO` (Core SO) ŌĆö `ExportSession(summarySO, roundResultSO, ratingHistorySO)` populates payload from non-null SOs, `JsonUtility.ToJson`, caches `_lastExportJson`, fires `_onExportCompleted`; `LastExportJson` property; `Reset()` clears cache; `OnEnableŌåÆReset()`. `ZoneControlSessionExportController` (Core MB) ŌĆö `_autoExportOnSessionEnd bool` default true; `_onSessionEndedŌåÆHandleSessionEndedŌåÆTriggerExport()` when auto; `TriggerExport()ŌåÆ_exportSO?.ExportSession(...)`; DisallowMultipleComponent. 12 tests.

**M70 Zone Control Ownership Map HUD, Reward History, Zone Countdown &amp; Auto-Capture ŌĆö ALL TASKS COMPLETE (T334ŌĆōT337).**
- T334: `ZoneControlOwnershipMapHUDController` (UI MB) ŌĆö reads `ZoneControlZoneControllerCatalogSO`; subscribes `_onControlChangedŌåÆRefresh`; `_zoneBadgeImages Image[]` colored `_playerColor`/`_botColor` per `GetZoneController(i)`; `_summaryLabel="Player Zones: N / Total"`; panel hidden when catalogSO null; DisallowMultipleComponent. 12 tests.
- T335: `ZoneControlRewardHistorySO` (Core SO) ŌĆö ring buffer `List<int>` `_capacity` default 5; `AddReward(int)` clampsŌēź0 + prunes oldest + fires `_onHistoryUpdated`; `GetReward(int)` OOB-safe; `GetAverageReward()` safe-div; `Reset()` clears silent. `ZoneControlRewardHistoryController` (UI MB) ŌĆö `_onMatchEndedŌåÆHandleMatchEndedŌåÆAddReward(captureBonusSO.TotalBonusAwarded)+Refresh`; `_onHistoryUpdatedŌåÆRefresh`; `_rewardBars fillAmount=Clamp01(reward/maxDisplayReward)`; `_averageLabel="Avg Reward: N"`; panel hidden when historySO null. 12 tests.
- T336: `ZoneControlZoneCountdownSO` (Core SO) ŌĆö `_duration [Min(0.1f)]` default 5f; `StartCountdown()` arms timer; `Tick(float)` decrements, fires `_onCountdownExpired` on expiry; `Progress=Clamp01(timer/duration)` while active, 0 idle; `Reset()` silent. `ZoneControlZoneCountdownController` (Core MB) ŌĆö `UpdateŌåÆTick`; `_onMatchStartedŌåÆHandleMatchStartedŌåÆStartCountdown`; DisallowMultipleComponent. 12 tests.

**Next milestone (M71):** Suggested directions: (a) `ZoneControlCountdownHUDController` (UI MB) ŌĆö subscribes `_onCountdownExpired`ŌåÆ`HandleExpired`; `UpdateŌåÆTick`; while countdown is active reads `ZoneControlZoneCountdownSO.Progress` and sets `_progressBar.value`; label shows `"Ready in {remaining:F1}s"` while active / `"Available"` on expiry; (b) `ZoneControlAutoCaptureHUDController` (UI MB) ŌĆö subscribes `_onAutoCaptureŌåÆHandleAutoCapture`; reads `ZoneControlAutoCaptureController.AccumulatedTime/_autoCaptureSO.AutoCaptureDuration`; `_progressBar.value` shows danger level; label `"Bot Takeover: {remaining:F1}s"`; flashing panel when accumulating; (c) `ZoneControlRewardSummarySO + ZoneControlRewardSummaryController` (Core SO + UI MB) ŌĆö aggregates per-session total rewards; `AddMatchReward(int)` accumulates; `TotalReward/MatchCount/AverageReward` properties; Controller subscribes `_onMatchEnded`ŌåÆreads `rewardHistorySO.GetAverageReward()`; HUD shows total, average, and best-match reward; (d) `ZoneControlOwnershipSnapshotSO + ZoneControlOwnershipSnapshotController` (Core SO + Core MB) ŌĆö captures `ZoneControlZoneControllerCatalogSO` ownership state as `bool[]` at match end; `TakeSnapshot(catalogSO)` clones ownership; `GetSnapshot(int)` OOB-safe; Controller subscribes `_onMatchEnded`ŌåÆ`TakeSnapshot`; fires `_onSnapshotTaken`.

**M66 Zone Control Heatmap, Match Pressure, Zone Lock &amp; Threat Assessment ŌĆö ALL TASKS COMPLETE (T318ŌĆōT321).**
- T318: `ZoneControlHeatmapSO` (Core SO) ŌĆö `_zoneCount [Min(1)]` default 4; `RecordCapture(int zoneIndex)` OOB-safe, increments per-zone count, fires `_onHeatmapUpdated`; `GetHeatLevel(int)` normalised 0ŌĆō1 vs `MaxCaptureCount`; `GetCaptureCount(int)` raw; `Reset()` re-allocates array silently. `ZoneControlHeatmapController` (UI MB) ŌĆö `_onZoneCaptured IntGameEvent`ŌåÆ`HandleZoneCaptured(int)`ŌåÆ`RecordCapture`; `_onMatchStarted`ŌåÆ`Reset+Refresh`; `_onHeatmapUpdated`ŌåÆ`Refresh`; `_heatBars Image[]`: `fillAmount=GetHeatLevel(i)`; `color=Color.Lerp(_coldColor,_hotColor,heat)`. 12 tests.
- T319: `ZoneControlMatchPressureSO` (Core SO) ŌĆö `_pressureIncrement/Decay [Range(0.1,1)]` defaults 0.25f; `_highPressureThreshold [Range(0.1,1)]` default 0.75f; `EvaluatePressure(bool botLeads)`: increase/decrease clamped to [0,1]; fires `_onHighPressure` on upward threshold crossing; fires `_onPressureRelieved` on downward crossing; `Reset()` silent. `ZoneControlMatchPressureController` (Core MB) ŌĆö `HandleScoreboardUpdated`ŌåÆ`EvaluatePressure(_scoreboardSO.PlayerRank>1)`; `HandleMatchStarted`ŌåÆ`_pressureSO?.Reset()`. 12 tests.
- T320: `ZoneControlZoneLockSO` (Core SO) ŌĆö `_lockDuration [Min(0.1f)]` default 5f; `LockZone()` sets `_isLocked=true` + resets timer + fires `_onZoneLocked`; `Tick(float dt)` decrements timer, fires `_onZoneUnlocked` on expiry; `LockProgress = _lockTimer/_lockDuration` (0 when unlocked); `Reset()` silent. `ZoneControlZoneLockController` (Core MB) ŌĆö `UpdateŌåÆ_lockSO?.Tick(Time.deltaTime)`; `_onZoneCapturedŌåÆHandleZoneCapturedŌåÆLockZone`; `_onMatchStartedŌåÆHandleMatchStartedŌåÆReset`. 12 tests.
- T321: `ZoneControlThreatAssessmentSO` (Core SO) ŌĆö `ThreatLevel` enum Low/Medium/High; `_mediumThreatRank [Min(2)]` default 2; `_highThreatRank [Min(2)]` default 3; `EvaluateThreat(int playerRank, bool hasDominance)`: rankŌēż1ŌåÆLow; rankŌēźhigh&amp;&amp;!domŌåÆHigh; rankŌēźmediumŌåÆMedium; fires `_onThreatChanged` only on level change; `Reset()` ŌåÆLow silent. `ZoneControlThreatAssessmentController` (UI MB) ŌĆö `HandleScoreboardUpdatedŌåÆEvaluateThreat(PlayerRank, dominanceSO?.HasDominance??false)`; `_onThreatChangedŌåÆRefresh`; `HandleMatchStartedŌåÆReset+Refresh`; Refresh: label=`threat.ToString()`; badge colour per threat (low=green/medium=yellow/high=red). 12 tests.

**Next milestone (M67):** Suggested directions: (a) `ZoneControlAdaptiveSpawnSO + ZoneControlAdaptiveSpawnController` (Core SO + Core MB) ŌĆö adjusts spawn rate of bot or loot based on `ZoneControlMatchPressureSO.IsHighPressure`; fires `_onSpawnRateChanged`; controller subscribes `_onHighPressure/_onPressureRelieved`ŌåÆ`SetSpawnRate`; (b) `ZoneControlHeatmapHistorySO + ZoneControlHeatmapHistoryController` (Core SO + UI MB) ŌĆö aggregates `ZoneControlHeatmapSO` snapshots across multiple matches; `AddSnapshot(int[])` appends per-zone counts; `GetLifetimeHeatLevel(int zoneIndex)` normalised across all sessions; controller subscribes `_onMatchEnded`ŌåÆsnapshot; HUD shows session vs lifetime heat comparison; (c) `ZoneControlZoneLockHUDController` (UI MB) ŌĆö subscribes `_onZoneLocked/_onZoneUnlocked`ŌåÆ`Refresh`; shows `_lockProgressBar.value = LockProgress`; `_lockLabel = "Locked: F1s"` / "Available"; panel hidden when not locked; (d) `ZoneControlAlertSystemSO + ZoneControlAlertSystemController` (Core SO + UI MB) ŌĆö combines `ZoneControlMatchPressureSO.IsHighPressure` + `ZoneControlThreatAssessmentSO.CurrentThreatŌēźHigh` + `ZoneDominanceSO.HasDominance=false` to declare a `CriticalAlert`; fires `_onCriticalAlert VoidGameEvent`; controller subscribes all three channels and calls `EvaluateAlert`; HUD shows flashing alert banner.

**M65 Match Event Timeline, Bot Difficulty, Match Goal &amp; Bonus Chest ŌĆö ALL TASKS COMPLETE (T314ŌĆōT317).**
- T314: `ZoneControlMatchEventSO` (Core SO) ŌĆö `ZoneControlMatchEventType` enum ZoneCaptured/HazardActivated/ComboReached; `ZoneControlMatchEvent [Serializable]`: Timestamp float/Type/Description string; bounded ring buffer `_maxEvents` default 20; `AddEvent(float,type,description)` evicts oldest when full, null description stored as Empty, fires `_onEventAdded`; `Reset()` clears silently; `Events IReadOnlyList`/`EventCount`/`MaxEvents`. `ZoneControlMatchEventController` (UI MB) ŌĆö subscribes `_onZoneCaptured/_onHazardActivated/_onComboReached`ŌåÆ`AddEvent(Time.time, type, label)`; `_onEventAddedŌåÆRefresh`; `_onMatchStartedŌåÆHandleMatchStarted(Reset+Refresh)`; Refresh destroys stale rows + spawns newest-first (texts[0]="{F1}s", texts[1]=description). 12 tests.
- T315: `ZoneControlBotDifficultyProfileSO` (Core SO) ŌĆö formula `Max(minimum, base - wave ├Ś reduction)`; `_baseCaptureInterval` default 10f; `_intervalReductionPerWave` default 0.5f; `_minimumInterval` default 2f; negative wave clamped to 0; `OnValidate` clamps minimum to [0.1, base]. `ZoneControlBotDifficultyController` (Core MB) ŌĆö subscribes `_onWaveStartedŌåÆHandleWaveStarted`(reads `WaveManagerSO.CurrentWave`, computes interval from profile, sets `_isRunning=true`); `Update` accumulates dt ŌåÆ `RecordBotCapture(0)` on expiry; `HandleMatchStarted/Ended` disarm timer; all refs optional. 12 tests.
- T316: `ZoneControlMatchGoalSO` (Core SO) ŌĆö `ZoneControlMatchGoalType` enum FirstToCaptures/MostZonesInTime; `IsGoalMet(int playerScore, int timeElapsed)`: FC ŌåÆ playerScoreŌēźcaptureTarget; MZ ŌåÆ timeElapsedŌēź(int)timeLimitSeconds; `GoalDescription` property; `OnValidate` clamps. `ZoneControlMatchGoalController` (UI MB) ŌĆö `HandleScoreboardUpdated`: null goalSO or already met ŌåÆ return; evaluates goal idempotently; first-met ŌåÆ `_isGoalMet=true + _onGoalMet?.Raise() + Refresh`; `HandleMatchStarted` resets flag + records `_matchStartTime = Time.time`; `Refresh` shows `GoalDescription`. 12 tests.
- T317: `ZoneControlBonusChestSO` (Core SO) ŌĆö `_captureInterval [Min(1)]` default 5; `CheckChest(int)`: integer division tracks `_lastMilestone`; fires `_onChestSpawned` + increments `_totalChests` per newly crossed interval (handles multi-interval jumps); `Reset()` silently zeros. `ZoneControlBonusChestController` (UI MB) ŌĆö `HandlePlayerCaptured` increments `_captureCount + CheckChest`; `HandleMatchStarted` resets count + SO; `Refresh` shows "Next chest: N". 12 tests.

**Next milestone (M66):** Suggested directions: (a) `ZoneControlHeatmapSO + ZoneControlHeatmapController` (Core SO + UI MB) ŌĆö tracks frequency of zone captures per zone index across a session; `RecordCapture(int zoneIndex)` increments per-zone count; `GetHeatLevel(int)` normalised 0ŌĆō1; HUD shows a bar per zone coloured by heat; (b) `ZoneControlMatchPressureSO + ZoneControlMatchPressureController` (Core SO + Core MB) ŌĆö accumulates a pressure float when bots lead on score; fires `_onHighPressure`/`_onPressureRelieved`; pressure decays if player re-takes lead; controller subscribes `_onScoreboardUpdated`; (c) `ZoneControlZoneLockSO + ZoneControlZoneLockController` (Core SO + Core MB) ŌĆö temporarily locks a zone from capture for `_lockDuration` seconds after it changes hands; `LockZone()/IsLocked/LockProgress`; controller subscribes `_onZoneCapturedŌåÆLockZone`; Update ticks unlock timer; (d) `ZoneControlThreatAssessmentSO + ZoneControlThreatAssessmentController` (Core SO + UI MB) ŌĆö scores bot threat level based on `ZoneControlScoreboardSO.PlayerRank` and `ZoneDominanceSO.HasDominance`; `ThreatLevel` enum Low/Medium/High; fires `_onThreatChanged`; HUD shows coloured threat badge.

**M60 Zone Control Career &amp; Adaptation Layer ŌĆö ALL TASKS COMPLETE (T294ŌĆōT297).**
- T294: `ZoneCapturePaceHistorySO` (Core SO) ŌĆö ring buffer `List<float>` capacity default 5; `AddPaceReading` clamps Ōēź0 + prunes oldest + fires `_onPaceHistoryUpdated`; `LoadSnapshot` bootstrapper-safe. `ZoneCapturePaceHistoryController` (UI MB) ŌĆö subscribes `_onMatchEnded`ŌåÆ`HandleMatchEnded`ŌåÆ`_trackerSO.GetCapturesPerMinute(Time.time)`+`AddPaceReading`; subscribes `_onPaceHistoryUpdated`ŌåÆ`Refresh`; bar chart: `_paceBarImages[i].enabled/fillAmount=Clamp01(rate/_maxDisplayRate)`. 12 tests.

- T296: `ZoneControlCareerSummaryController` (UI MB) ŌĆö subscribes `_onSummaryUpdated`ŌåÆ`Refresh`; labels: "Total Zones: N", "Avg/Match: F1", "Best Streak: N"; badge sparkline from `ZoneControlMatchRatingHistorySO`: 1-2Ōśģ red, 3Ōśģ yellow, 4-5Ōśģ green; panel hidden when summarySO null. 12 tests.
- T297: `ZoneControlSessionReportController` (UI MB) ŌĆö subscribes `_onMatchEnded`ŌåÆ`HandleMatchEnded`ŌåÆ`Refresh`; labels: "Zones: N", "Matches: N", "Rating: N / 5" (from `_ratingController.CurrentRating`), advice (from `_advisorController.ComputeAdvice()`); panel hidden when summarySO null; all scene refs optional/null-safe. 14 tests.

**Next milestone (M62):** Suggested directions: (a) `ZoneControlAchievementCatalogSO + ZoneControlAchievementController` (Core SO + UI MB) ŌĆö catalog of zone-capture achievements (e.g. "Capture 50 zones", "Win with full dominance", "Complete 3 weekly challenges"); evaluates against `ZoneControlSessionSummarySO` at match end; fires `_onAchievementUnlocked` per newly earned achievement; `LoadSnapshot` tracks earned IDs; (b) `ZoneControlRankingSO + ZoneControlRankingController` (Core SO + UI MB) ŌĆö assigns a rank title (Bronze/Silver/Gold/Platinum/Diamond) based on cumulative `TotalZonesCaptured` + `UnlockedTiers`; subscribes `_onGateUnlocked`ŌåÆ`EvaluateRank`; fires `_onRankChanged`; HUD shows rank badge and next-rank threshold; (c) `ZoneControlDailyChallengeConfig + ZoneControlDailyChallengeController` (Core SO + UI MB) ŌĆö re-rolls a fresh `ZoneControlWeeklyChallengeSO`-compatible target daily using a seeded RNG from `System.DateTime.Today`; shows countdown label "Resets in Xh Ym"; (d) `ZoneControlHighScoreSO + ZoneControlHighScoreController` (Core SO + UI MB) ŌĆö persists best single-match zone count, best pace, and best streak; `LoadSnapshot`/`TakeSnapshot` bootstrapper-safe; updates at match end; fires `_onNewHighScore` per category; HUD shows current bests with "NEW!" badge.

**M50 Zone Control Orchestration &amp; Feedback ŌĆö ALL TASKS COMPLETE (T255ŌĆōT258).**
- T255: `ControlZoneCatalogSO` + `ControlZoneCatalogController` ŌĆö Core SO catalog of `ControlZoneSO[]`; `GetZone(int)` null-safe bounds-checked; `ResetAll()` iterates non-null entries; Controller MB subscribes match start/end ŌåÆ `_catalog?.ResetAll()`; `EntryCount` delegates to catalog. 12 tests.
- T256: `ZoneDominanceSO` + `ZoneDominanceController` ŌĆö Core SO tracks player zone count; `AddPlayerZone/RemovePlayerZone` clamped to `[0,TotalZones]` + fire `_onDominanceChanged`; `HasDominance = count*2 > TotalZones`; Controller bridges `_onPlayerZoneCaptured`ŌåÆ`AddPlayerZone`, `_onPlayerZoneLost`ŌåÆ`RemovePlayerZone`, match eventsŌåÆ`Reset`. 14 tests.
- T257: `ZoneDominanceHUDController` ŌĆö UI MB subscribes `_onDominanceChanged`ŌåÆ`Refresh`; label `"P: N / Total"`, `_dominanceBar.value = DominanceRatio`, `_bonusPanel.SetActive(HasDominance)`; panel hidden when SO null. 12 tests.
- T258: `ZoneCaptureNotificationController` ŌĆö UI MB timed notification banner; `ShowCapture/ShowLost` sets label + panel active + timer; `Tick` decrements and hides on expiry; defaults: 2s, "ZONE CAPTURED!", "ZONE LOST!". 12 tests.

**Next milestone (M51):** Suggested directions: (a) `ZoneDominanceBonusApplier` (Physics MB) ŌĆö subscribes `_onMatchStarted`; reads `ZoneDominanceSO.HasDominance`; if true, applies a flat damage or score bonus via `WeaponAttachmentController.AddDamageBonus` or `ScoreMultiplierSO.SetMultiplier`; reset at match end; (b) `ControlZonePresenterController` (UI MB) ŌĆö reads `ControlZoneCatalogSO`; displays a row per zone showing `ZoneId`, `CaptureRatio` Slider, and Captured/Uncaptured badge; subscribes to each zone's `_onCaptured`/`_onLost` for reactive refresh; (c) `ZoneObjectiveSO` + `ZoneObjectiveController` (Core) ŌĆö match win-by-zones condition: player wins if `ZoneDominanceSO.PlayerZoneCount >= _requiredZones` at match end; fires `_onObjectiveComplete` VoidGameEvent; Controller subscribes `_onMatchEnded` and evaluates; (d) `ZoneTimerSO` + `ZoneTimerController` (Core) ŌĆö per-zone capture cooldown: after a zone is lost, block re-capture for `_cooldownDuration` seconds; Controller subscribes `_onLost`; sets `_isOnCooldown`; blocks `ControlZoneController` via a shared bool channel or SO flag.

**M48 Arena Phase-Hazard Integration &amp; Clock ŌĆö ALL TASKS COMPLETE (T247ŌĆōT250).**
- T247: `ArenaPhaseHazardBridgeSO` + `ArenaPhaseHazardBridgeController` ŌĆö config SO pairs phase `VoidGameEvent` ŌåÆ `HazardZoneGroupSO`; controller pre-allocates per-entry delegates in Awake; OnEnable subscribes all channels; `ActivateGroup(i)` deactivates all other groups then activates target. 14 tests.
- T248: `MatchClockSO` + `MatchClockHUDController` ŌĆö authoritative countdown SO (180s default, 30s warning threshold); `StartClock/StopClock/Tick/Reset`; HUD formats `MM:SS`, shows warning panel on `WarningFired`; delegates match-start/end events to SO. 16 tests.
- T249: `ArenaHazardResetController` ŌĆö Physics MB subscribes `_onMatchStarted`; `HandleMatchStarted()` sets `IsActive=false` on all `HazardZoneController[]` + calls `Reset()` on all `HazardZoneGroupSO[]` silently; fully null-safe. 14 tests.
- T250: `WaveHazardIntensifierSO` + `WaveHazardIntensifierController` ŌĆö formula `Max(min, base ŌłÆ wave├Średuction)`; `HazardZoneGroupToggleController` patched with `SetToggleInterval(float)`; controller subscribes `_onWaveStarted`; reads `WaveManagerSO.CurrentWave`; applies interval to all `_toggleControllers`. 14 tests.

**Next milestone (M49):** Suggested directions: (a) `MatchClockManagerController` (Core MB) ŌĆö subscribes `_onMatchStarted`/`_onMatchEnded`; calls `MatchClockSO.StartClock()`/`StopClock()` centrally so individual UI controllers don't need to drive the clock; optional `_clockSO` + two VoidGameEvent channels; pairs with `MatchClockHUDController` for complete clock pipeline; (b) `ArenaHazardPhaseIntegrator` (Physics MB) ŌĆö combines `ArenaPhaseController` + `ArenaPhaseHazardBridgeController` + `ArenaHazardResetController` in a single orchestrator; subscribes `_onMatchStarted`; calls `HandleMatchStarted` on all three in order (reset ŌåÆ phase start ŌåÆ bridge ready); single inspector slot instead of three separate GOs; (c) `HazardZoneGroupCatalogPresenter` (UI MB) ŌĆö reads `HazardZoneGroupCatalogSO`; subscribes `_onGroupActivated`/`_onGroupDeactivated` for each group; maintains a grid of status indicators (active=green, inactive=red) for arena-state HUD; (d) `WaveIntensityHUDController` (UI MB) ŌĆö reads `WaveHazardIntensifierSO` + `WaveManagerSO`; displays current wave toggle interval as "Hazard Speed: Xs"; subscribes `_onWaveStarted` for live refresh.

**M47 Arena Automation &amp; Catalog Layer ŌĆö ALL TASKS COMPLETE (T243ŌĆōT246).**
- T243: `HazardZoneGroupToggleController` (Physics MB: auto-toggles `_group HazardZoneGroupSO` every `_toggleInterval [Min(1f)]` seconds during a match; HandleMatchStarted/HandleMatchEnded start/stop; Tick accumulates dt; fires `_onGroupToggled` on each toggle; all refs optional; zero alloc). 14 tests.
- T244: `RespawnProtectionHUDController` (UI MB: drives local countdown from same `_onRespawnReady` event + `RespawnProtectionSO.ProtectionDuration`; no Physics refs; Tick updates `_shieldBar.value=remaining/duration` + `_timerLabel="{remaining:F1}s"`; EndProtection hides `_panel`). 14 tests.
- T245: `ArenaPhase` [Serializable] struct + `ArenaPhaseControllerSO` SO + `ArenaPhaseController` MB (Core: data-driven N-phase lifecycle; HandleMatchStarted fires phase[0] event; Tick advancesŌåÆAdvancePhase; AdvancePhase fires next event or `OnAllPhasesComplete`; Tick/AdvancePhase public for EditMode). 16 tests.
- T246: `HazardZoneGroupCatalogSO` SO + `HazardZoneGroupCatalogController` MB (Core: catalog of `HazardZoneGroupSO[]`; GetGroup(int) null-safe bounds-checked; controller exposes ActivateGroup/DeactivateGroup/ToggleGroup(int); all null-safe pass-throughs; no Update ŌĆö command-driven). 12 tests.

**Next milestone (M48):** Suggested directions: (a) `ArenaPhaseHazardBridgeSO` + `ArenaPhaseHazardBridgeController` (Core MB) ŌĆö binds each `ArenaPhaseControllerSO` phase index to a `HazardZoneGroupSO` entry; when a phase fires its event, the bridge activates the matching group and deactivates all others; config SO holds `ArenaPhaseHazardBridgeEntry[] { int phaseIndex; HazardZoneGroupSO group; }`; pairs ArenaPhaseController + HazardZoneGroupCatalog; (b) `MatchClockSO` + `MatchClockHUDController` (Core SO + UI MB) ŌĆö authoritative in-match countdown/count-up timer; `_duration [Min(1f)]`; `Tick(dt)` accumulates; fires `_onTimeWarning` at configurable threshold; fires `_onTimeExpired`; HUD shows MM:SS + warning flash when near zero; (c) `ArenaHazardResetController` (Physics MB) ŌĆö subscribes `_onMatchStarted`; calls `IsActive=false` on all managed `HazardZoneController[]` and calls `Reset()` on `HazardZoneGroupSO[]` and `ArenaHazardSequenceSO`; ensures clean arena state at match start without scene reload; (d) `WaveHazardIntensifierSO` + `WaveHazardIntensifierController` (Core SO + Physics MB) ŌĆö integrates with `WaveManagerSO`; each wave multiplies hazard cycle speed or toggle interval; `_intensityPerWave [Min(0f)]`; patches `ArenaHazardSequenceController.Config.CycleDuration` or `HazardZoneGroupToggleController._toggleInterval` via public setters added for the purpose.

**ArenaHazardWarningController wiring (T226) ŌĆö Editor-session steps:**
1. Add `ArenaHazardWarningController` to the in-match HUD canvas.
   - `_hazardZones`      ŌåÆ Array of HazardZoneSO assets (one per arena hazard).
   - `_hazardTransforms` ŌåÆ Parallel array of Transforms at each hazard's world position.
   - `_robotTransform`   ŌåÆ The player robot's root Transform.
   - `_warningDistance`  ŌåÆ Distance threshold (e.g. 10f world units).
   - `_bannerPanel`      ŌåÆ Root warning panel (hidden when all hazards are out of range).
   - `_hazardNameLabel`  ŌåÆ Text showing the nearest hazard type name.
   - `_distanceLabel`    ŌåÆ Text showing "{N}m" distance to nearest hazard.

**RespawnCountdownController wiring (T227) ŌĆö Editor-session steps:**
1. Create a `RobotRespawn` SO asset: Assets Ō¢Č Create Ō¢Č BattleRobots Ō¢Č Core Ō¢Č RobotRespawn.
   - Wire `_onRespawnUsed` ŌåÆ a shared VoidGameEvent (e.g. "OnRespawnUsed").
   - Wire `_onRespawnReady` ŌåÆ a shared VoidGameEvent (e.g. "OnRespawnReady").
2. Add `RespawnCountdownController` to the in-match HUD canvas.
   - `_respawnSO`              ŌåÆ the RobotRespawnSO asset above.
   - `_onRespawnUsed`          ŌåÆ same VoidGameEvent.
   - `_onRespawnReady`         ŌåÆ same VoidGameEvent.
   - `_countdownLabel`         ŌåÆ Text showing "N.Fs" while cooling down, or "Ready".

   - `_panel`                  ŌåÆ Root panel.
3. Call RobotRespawnSO.UseRespawn() when the robot is destroyed.
4. Wire RobotRespawnSO.Reset() to the MatchStarted event.

**BonusObjectiveHUDController wiring (T228) ŌĆö Editor-session steps:**
